subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! That which thou didst write was noted, and praise be to God that it indicateth steadfastness in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان آنچه نگاشتی ملاحظه گردید حمد خدا را که دلالت بر استقامت در
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @growth of the Cause
